free_text: Dipole and spin-dipole resonances in charge-exchange
reactions on 12C
Indiana University Cyclotron Laboratory
At IUCF six 120cm x 10cm x 15 cm plastic NE102
detectors stacked together covered angular range
theta=0-50 deg. Energy resolution was 1 MeV for the
0 deg station at flight path of 101m and 1.5 MeV for
the 24 deg detector station at flight path of 62 m.
Time of flight was used to determine incident
neutron energy
Reference contains figures (2,10,12,13), which appear
to be raw experimental data containing data at negative
energies and were not compiled.
Data on neutron induced reactions contained in the
reference are compiled in EXFOR ENTRY 14204
No information given
Compiled by S.H.
